title: Allow hrn self-commits and guardian transitions without commits
goal: Enable hrn to create commits itself and permit Guardian state transitions regardless of whether a Git commit exists, while preserving verified workflow behavior.

acceptanceCriteria.description: The user confirmed the shared understanding.

workUnits.title: Create an approved plan
workUnits.purpose: Convert the clarified requirement into an executable plan.
stopConditions: Stop when a material ambiguity remains.
